sglang.title: [feat] Reduce GPU memory overhead by using weakref
sglang.author: yhyang201
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Due to circular references, some objects containing Tensor instances (likely ScheduleBatch objects) were detected by Python’s garbage collector but not released immediately. Instead, they accumulated for a period of time before being freed, causing torch.cuda.memory_allocated() and torch.

sglang.title: bugfix(hicache): Move exists check before key suffixing
sglang.author: hzh0425
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The original code in HiCacheFile.set method had a logical error where self.exists(key) was called after key = self._get_suffixed_key(key), causing key suffix duplication:
If self.exists(key) is called after key = self._get_suffixed_key(key), the key gets double-suffixed

vllm.title: [BugFix][Spec Decode] Use float64 for uniform_probs
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Using float32 for uniform_probs can be dangerous because exact 0 can be sampled with a non-negligible probability: pytorch/pytorch#16706
This PR mitigates the issue by using float64 instead of float32

vllm.title: [Models] Improve iteration over layers
vllm.author: lgeiger
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Slicing a torch.nn.ModuleList as done in self.layers[self.start_layer:self.end_layer] creates a new torch.nn.ModuleList. This is pretty fast but not free and can't be overlapped with GPU compute as it executes at the start of the Module.forward().
This also shows up in a model profile (this
